core_mechanism: statistical-physics partition-function / free-energy evaluation of a large-deviations rate function, computing the exponential decay rate of a rare-event probability averaged over a disordered random ensemble via a saddle-point / Laplace (method-of-types) analysis
brief_reason: The abstract derives a single-letter exponential error bound (a large-deviations exponent) for a random-coding ensemble using 'analytical tools rooted in statistical physics', treating the random codebook as a disordered system whose free energy yields the decay rate.
